reasoning: XLK (tech) -2.87% leading downside with XLE (energy) -1.85% in support, while XLF (financials) remains flat at +0.27%. Classic risk-off rotation: tech weakness + energy decline with no financial offset = bearish sector breadth. XLK's 2.87% decline is substantial and outweighs SPY's -1.27%, indicating tech-led selling. Two of three key sectors aligned downside (XLK + XLE) confirms risk-off bias with medium-high conviction.

XLF: +0.27% (financials neutral/flat; no yield-curve support offset for risk-off)
XLE: -1.85% (energy selling in line with risk-off; not defensive rotation)
